phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dov'è l'ingresso per Palazzo Ducale, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, doh-VEH leen-GRES-so per pa-LAT-soh doo-KAH-leh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: Porta della Carta, lato Piazza San Marco.
likely_response.pronunciation: POHR-tah DEHL-lah KAHR-tah LAH-toh pee-AHTS-tsah SAHN MAHR-koh
likely_response.translation_en: Porta della Carta, San Marco Square side.

responses.english: Porta della Carta, San Marco Square side.
responses.phonetic: POHR-tah DEHL-lah KAHR-tah LAH-toh pee-AHTS-tsah SAHN MAHR-koh
responses.local: Porta della Carta, lato Piazza San Marco.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, quanto costa il biglietto intero, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KWAN-toh KOH-stah eel bee-LYET-toh in-TEH-roh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: It is indicated at the ticket office.

responses.english: It is indicated at the ticket office.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, conviene prenotare per saltare la fila, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, kon-VYEH-neh pre-noh-TAH-reh per sal-TAH-reh lah FEE-lah, per fah-VOH-reh

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove si attraversa il Ponte dei Sospiri, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwon-JOR-noh DOH-veh see ah-trah-VER-sah eel PON-teh day soh-SPEE-ree per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: Si attraversa all'interno del museo, seguendo le indicazioni.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE ahtt-rah-VEHR-sah ahll-'een-TEHR-noh DEHL moo-SEH-oh seh-goo-EHN-doh LEH een-dee-kah-tsee-OH-nee
likely_response.translation_en: You cross it inside the museum, following the signs.

responses.english: You cross it inside the museum, following the signs.
responses.phonetic: SEE ahtt-rah-VEHR-sah ahll-'een-TEHR-noh DEHL moo-SEH-oh seh-goo-EHN-doh LEH een-dee-kah-tsee-OH-nee
responses.local: Si attraversa all'interno del museo, seguendo le indicazioni.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, c'è un guardaroba per gli zaini, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, cheh oon goo-ar-dah-ROH-bah per LYEE dzah-EE-nee, per fah-VOH-reh
